positive: A detailed, stylized illustration of a majestic, stylized mountain lion prowling through a dense, tropical jungle canopy. The style is inspired by intricate Art Deco geometric patterns mixed with modern nature illustration. The mountain lion has a powerful, graceful silhouette, rendered in deep indigo and burnt orange tones, contrasted against vibrant emerald green and teal foliage. Focus on clean lines, strong cross-hatching detailing, and negative space utilization. The composition must be central and balanced, designed to fit perfectly on a t-shirt print. High contrast, stylized shading, flat graphic design aesthetic, highly detailed, perfect for commercial apparel printing.
